ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "code" TEXT /* Stock code (e.g., sh.600116) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange (e.g., Shanghai Stock Exchange) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Total market value of the company's outstanding shares */,
  "fifty_two_week_high" REAL /* The highest price the stock has reached in the past 52 weeks */,
  "fifty_two_week_low" REAL /* The lowest price the stock has reached in the past 52 weeks */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* The annual dividend yield as a percentage of the stock price */,
  "last_dividend" REAL /* The most recent dividend paid by the company */,
  "earnings_date" TEXT /* The date when the company is expected to report earnings */,
  "fiscal_year_end" TEXT /* The end date of the company's fiscal year */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number for the stock */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures number for the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_sector FOREIGN KEY ("sector") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_industry FOREIGN KEY ("industry") REFERENCES industries ("industry_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange FOREIGN KEY ("exchange") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the stock exchange */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the stock exchange */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* The time zone in which the stock exchange operates */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* The hours during which the stock exchange is open for trading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "parent_industry" TEXT /* The parent industry under which the industry falls */,
  "industry_classification" TEXT /* The classification of the industry (e.g., GICS, ICB) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "parent_sector" TEXT /* The parent sector under which the sector falls */,
  "sector_classification" TEXT /* The classification of the sector (e.g., GICS, ICB) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., portfolio manager, financial analyst, risk manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* The hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* The number of failed login attempts */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* The status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the client making the request */,
  "response_time" REAL /* The time taken to respond to the request */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* The HTTP status code of the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the metric data */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the financial metric */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the financial metric data (e.g., financial statements, market data) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* The frequency of the metric data (e.g., daily, quarterly, annually) */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* The type of metric (e.g., financial, operational, market) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_feed" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the news */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* The URL of the news article */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* A score indicating the sentiment of the news article (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* A score indicating the relevance of the news article to the stock */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or keywords associated with the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_feed_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
